lift_rule.atom_to_sector: split active atom mass across the three H6 sectors in its d20 atom
lift_rule.atom_to_signature_class: split active atom mass uniformly across its certified symbolic signature-class set
lift_rule.integer_split: use exact x1e12 integer mass; divide fairly left-to-right so each output layer sums exactly to 1e12
lift_rule.node_to_atom: split each core-node stationary mass across its three canonical atom slots, preserving repeated atom slots
